TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Buner, title = Buner, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buner} }

S.FORM: = Buner = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Buner. 1,710 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 4,775 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 24% niqan 1,133 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 76% niqan 3,642 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 21%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu nniqan Nans Amis ka alang Buner. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Buner. Gasuc nniqan Kssiyaw hari alang Buner ni alang Nancang. Lnglingay tiri Breenux. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu: Taypey>Kwotaw 3 haw>Elug Taypey 3cya(tunux bi elug Sngken)>elug wunsan>Syeyn 103>Syeyn 106>Peyyi kungru>Pinhaw kungru>Suhwa kungru>Elug Kwangfu>Elug Cyari>Elug cungyang>Elug heping >elug ccyang>Hwa 25>Cisyang 4cyey>Yicang 7cyey>Wunhwa 7cyey>Elug nancang>Dhuq. Sjiqan klgan nealang Kari Amis ni Tlu. Djiyun kari Amis. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Nniqan alang Natauran ka Nans Amis. Kika gasuc nniqan alang nii o, Buner, Nancang supu kingal alang, kika tmhangan dha hunac Buner ka seejiq Amis. Pgkla patas rmigaw Pusu bi pnhyugan: ‚óéBuner ciway sapah pyasan 03-8520209 Nuysan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Buner Buner 1Ciye tg45 ‚óéBuner kska sapah pyasan 03-8520803 Nuysan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Buner Buner 1Ciye tg41 ‚óéSaan qmita ana manu hnici qyqaya rdrudan sbiyaw seejiq Amis 03-8531468 Nuysan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Nancang wunhwa 5 ciye tg43 Mniq idas 10 hngkawas 2001 siida rnwahan ka pshyugan sapah nii, gaga ruwan nsgan Cian, nniqan snslian mbbiyax ni Sowangsor seuxal han, biqun nseejiq snkuan knklaan rudan sbiyaw(Gaya), Yisu, sangay, sslian ni mnuda ana manu quri saw kungyi uri. Pusu psaan qyqaya hnici rudan sbiyaw seejiq Amis ka ruwan, kika biqun ta kingal nniqan qyqaya hnici rudan sbiyaw nii, rngagun ida ana manu mnuda ta rudan sbiyaw, pkkla ni knklaan, lntulan snluan baga uri. Tuki rawah rhngun :Jiyax iyax sngayan 2 dhuq 7 8:00-17:00 , jiyax iyax sngayan 1 o sangay ki han. Gipu:Ungac pila ni tduwa mrmux musa qmita ( twanti o nasi musa su ungac sangay jiyax asi ka dama pkla han )
S.PHON: = bun…ô…ĺ = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn ¶iansjaŇč ka alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, t…ĺuku *%, bunun *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč pusu nniqan nans amis ka alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ. gasu ¶ nniqan kssijaw ńßa…ĺi alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ ni alaŇč nan ¶aŇč. lŇčliŇčaj ti…ĺi b…ĺ…ô…ônux. pkkla patas ppanun mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwotaw * ńßaw>…ôlug tajp…ô * ¶ja(tunux bi …ôlug sŇčk…ôn)>…ôlug wunsan>sj…ôn ***>sj…ôn ***>p…ôji kuŇč…ĺu>pinńßaw kuŇč…ĺu>suńßwa kuŇč…ĺu>…ôlug kwaŇč*u>…ôlug ¶ja…ĺi>…ôlug ¶uŇčjaŇč>…ôlug ńß…ôpiŇč >…ôlug ¶ ¶jaŇč>ńßwa **> ¶isjaŇč * ¶j…ô>ji ¶aŇč * ¶j…ô>wunńßwa * ¶j…ô>…ôlug nan ¶aŇč>dńßuq. s…üiqan klgan n…ôalaŇč ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. d…üijun ka…ĺi amis. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč nniqan alaŇč natau…ĺan ka nans amis. kika gasu ¶ nniqan alaŇč nii o, bun…ô…ĺ, nan ¶aŇč supu kiŇčal alaŇč, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa ńßuna ¶ bun…ô…ĺ ka s…ô…ô…üiq amis. pgkla patas …ĺmigaw pusu bi pnńßjugan: *bun…ô…ĺ ¶iwaj sapańß pjasan **-******* nujsan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ bun…ô…ĺ * ¶ij…ô tg** *bun…ô…ĺ kska sapańß pjasan **-******* nujsan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ bun…ô…ĺ * ¶ij…ô tg** *saan qmita ana manu ńßni ¶i qjqaja …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw s…ô…ô…üiq amis **-******* nujsan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč nan ¶aŇč wunńßwa * ¶ij…ô tg** mniq idas ** ńßŇčkawas **** siida …ĺnwańßan ka psńßjugan sapańß nii, gaga …ĺuwan nsgan ¶ian, nniqan snslian mbbijax ni sowaŇčso…ĺ s…ôuxal ńßan, biqun ns…ô…ô…üiq snkuan knklaan …ĺudan sbijaw(gaja), jisu, saŇčaj, sslian ni mnuda ana manu qu…ĺi saw kuŇčji u…ĺi. pusu psaan qjqaja ńßni ¶i …ĺudan sbijaw s…ô…ô…üiq amis ka …ĺuwan, kika biqun ta kiŇčal nniqan qjqaja ńßni ¶i …ĺudan sbijaw nii, …ĺŇčagun ida ana manu mnuda ta …ĺudan sbijaw, pkkla ni knklaan, lntulan snluan baga u…ĺi. tuki …ĺawańß …ĺńßŇčun :…üijax ijax sŇčajan * dńßuq * *:**-**:** , …üijax ijax sŇčajan * o saŇčaj ki ńßan. gipu:uŇča ¶ pila ni tduwa m…ĺmux musa qmita ( twanti o nasi musa su uŇča ¶ saŇčaj …üijax asi ka dama pkla ńßan )
S.FORM: = Buner = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Buner. 1,710 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 4,775 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 24% niqan 1,133 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 76% niqan 3,642 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 21%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu nniqan Nans Amis ka alang Buner. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Buner. Gasuc nniqan Kssiyaw hari alang Buner ni alang Nancang. Lnglingay tiri Breenux. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu: Taypey>Kwotaw 3 haw>Elug Taypey 3cya(tunux bi elug Sngken)>elug wunsan>Syeyn 103>Syeyn 106>Peyyi kungru>Pinhaw kungru>Suhwa kungru>Elug Kwangfu>Elug Cyari>Elug cungyang>Elug heping >elug ccyang>Hwa 25>Cisyang 4cyey>Yicang 7cyey>Wunhwa 7cyey>Elug nancang>Dhuq. Sjiqan klgan nealang Kari Amis ni Tlu. Djiyun kari Amis. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Nniqan alang Natauran ka Nans Amis. Kika gasuc nniqan alang nii o, Buner, Nancang supu kingal alang, kika tmhangan dha hunac Buner ka seejiq Amis. Pgkla patas rmigaw Pusu bi pnhyugan: ‚óéBuner ciway sapah pyasan 03-8520209 Nuysan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Buner Buner 1Ciye tg45 ‚óéBuner kska sapah pyasan 03-8520803 Nuysan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Buner Buner 1Ciye tg41 ‚óéSaan qmita ana manu hnici qyqaya rdrudan sbiyaw seejiq Amis 03-8531468 Nuysan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Nancang wunhwa 5 ciye tg43 Mniq idas 10 hngkawas 2001 siida rnwahan ka pshyugan sapah nii, gaga ruwan nsgan Cian, nniqan snslian mbbiyax ni Sowangsor seuxal han, biqun nseejiq snkuan knklaan rudan sbiyaw(Gaya), Yisu, sangay, sslian ni mnuda ana manu quri saw kungyi uri. Pusu psaan qyqaya hnici rudan sbiyaw seejiq Amis ka ruwan, kika biqun ta kingal nniqan qyqaya hnici rudan sbiyaw nii, rngagun ida ana manu mnuda ta rudan sbiyaw, pkkla ni knklaan, lntulan snluan baga uri. Tuki rawah rhngun :Jiyax iyax sngayan 2 dhuq 7 8:00-17:00 , jiyax iyax sngayan 1 o sangay ki han. Gipu:Ungac pila ni tduwa mrmux musa qmita ( twanti o nasi musa su ungac sangay jiyax asi ka dama pkla han )
S.PHON: = bun…ô…ĺ = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn ¶iansjaŇč ka alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, t…ĺuku *%, bunun *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč pusu nniqan nans amis ka alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ. gasu ¶ nniqan kssijaw ńßa…ĺi alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ ni alaŇč nan ¶aŇč. lŇčliŇčaj ti…ĺi b…ĺ…ô…ônux. pkkla patas ppanun mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwotaw * ńßaw>…ôlug tajp…ô * ¶ja(tunux bi …ôlug sŇčk…ôn)>…ôlug wunsan>sj…ôn ***>sj…ôn ***>p…ôji kuŇč…ĺu>pinńßaw kuŇč…ĺu>suńßwa kuŇč…ĺu>…ôlug kwaŇč*u>…ôlug ¶ja…ĺi>…ôlug ¶uŇčjaŇč>…ôlug ńß…ôpiŇč >…ôlug ¶ ¶jaŇč>ńßwa **> ¶isjaŇč * ¶j…ô>ji ¶aŇč * ¶j…ô>wunńßwa * ¶j…ô>…ôlug nan ¶aŇč>dńßuq. s…üiqan klgan n…ôalaŇč ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. d…üijun ka…ĺi amis. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč nniqan alaŇč natau…ĺan ka nans amis. kika gasu ¶ nniqan alaŇč nii o, bun…ô…ĺ, nan ¶aŇč supu kiŇčal alaŇč, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa ńßuna ¶ bun…ô…ĺ ka s…ô…ô…üiq amis. pgkla patas …ĺmigaw pusu bi pnńßjugan: *bun…ô…ĺ ¶iwaj sapańß pjasan **-******* nujsan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ bun…ô…ĺ * ¶ij…ô tg** *bun…ô…ĺ kska sapańß pjasan **-******* nujsan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč bun…ô…ĺ bun…ô…ĺ * ¶ij…ô tg** *saan qmita ana manu ńßni ¶i qjqaja …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw s…ô…ô…üiq amis **-******* nujsan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč nan ¶aŇč wunńßwa * ¶ij…ô tg** mniq idas ** ńßŇčkawas **** siida …ĺnwańßan ka psńßjugan sapańß nii, gaga …ĺuwan nsgan ¶ian, nniqan snslian mbbijax ni sowaŇčso…ĺ s…ôuxal ńßan, biqun ns…ô…ô…üiq snkuan knklaan …ĺudan sbijaw(gaja), jisu, saŇčaj, sslian ni mnuda ana manu qu…ĺi saw kuŇčji u…ĺi. pusu psaan qjqaja ńßni ¶i …ĺudan sbijaw s…ô…ô…üiq amis ka …ĺuwan, kika biqun ta kiŇčal nniqan qjqaja ńßni ¶i …ĺudan sbijaw nii, …ĺŇčagun ida ana manu mnuda ta …ĺudan sbijaw, pkkla ni knklaan, lntulan snluan baga u…ĺi. tuki …ĺawańß …ĺńßŇčun :…üijax ijax sŇčajan * dńßuq * *:**-**:** , …üijax ijax sŇčajan * o saŇčaj ki ńßan. gipu:uŇča ¶ pila ni tduwa m…ĺmux musa qmita ( twanti o nasi musa su uŇča ¶ saŇčaj …üijax asi ka dama pkla ńßan )
